entries.title: Sirius believed traitor until Shrieking Shack

content.fact: Before the Shrieking Shack reveal, Harry and the wider wizarding public believe Sirius Black betrayed the Potters and murdered Peter Pettigrew.
content.injection: Before the Shrieking Shack reveal, write Sirius as a feared fugitive in Harry’s understanding; do not reveal his innocence, godfather role, or Pettigrew truth to the protagonists early.
constraints: Use this as a story-position gate, not a general encyclopedia fact.
If the active Context is before this window, block this state unless accepted story lore explicitly changed it.
Apply only when Saga Context matches Before Shrieking Shack reveal; if the scene is earlier, withhold this fact or state.

content.fact: Before the Shrieking Shack endgame, Scabbers is not known to be Peter Pettigrew and Pettigrew is presumed dead.
content.injection: Before Pettigrew is exposed, block casual knowledge that Scabbers is an Animagus or that Peter is alive; the rat should function as Ron’s pet and a source of unexplained clues.
constraints: Use this as a story-position gate, not a general encyclopedia fact.

entries.title: Hermione Time-Turner remains secret until reveal

content.fact: Hermione’s overloaded timetable is enabled by a hidden Time-Turner, but Harry and Ron do not know that explanation until the rescue sequence.
content.injection: Before the Time-Turner reveal, show Hermione’s stress and impossible schedule as clues, not open knowledge; do not have Harry or Ron plan time travel early.
constraints: Use this as a story-position gate, not a general encyclopedia fact.

entries.title: Lupin werewolf identity hidden until late

content.fact: Before the full-moon endgame, Lupin’s werewolf condition is not openly known to Harry’s cohort, though clues exist.
content.injection: Before Lupin transforms, do not have students casually know his lycanthropy; use absences, Snape’s hints, and Wolfsbane-adjacent clues without making the secret public.
constraints: Use this as a story-position gate, not a general encyclopedia fact.
If the active Context is before this window, block this state unless accepted story lore explicitly changed it.
Apply only when Saga Context matches Before Lupin transforms; if the scene is earlier, withhold this fact or state.

content.fact: Harry trains the Patronus across Year 3 and does not reliably produce the full stag Patronus until the lake rescue sequence.
content.injection: During Patronus training, let Harry improve but do not give him effortless full Patronus mastery before the lake event unless accepted story lore changed his training.
constraints: Use this as a story-position gate, not a general encyclopedia fact.
